title: The Ravensreach Affair
description: A short investigative campaign. Several named NPCs, a hidden item, a betrayal, and an early promise made to a minor character. Designed so the probes at the end can only be answered correctly by recalling specific canon planted in early turns.
turns: I arrive in the river-town of Ravensreach at dusk and step into the herbalist shop The Gilded Mortar. The owner introduces herself as Mira Ashfen, a half-elf alchemist with a pale scar across her left brow. She offers me a potion of clear-sight in exchange for retrieving a moonpetal flower from the Hollow Glade.

I leave the shop and head to the Whispering Hollow tavern to ask about the Glade. The innkeeper Bram Cole, a one-eyed retired sergeant, warns me that Lord Vance's brother-in-law Captain Olwen patrols the eastern road and stops every traveller.
Before I leave, a barmaid named Senna slips me a folded note saying her sister Kira was last seen near the Glade three nights ago. I promise Senna I will look for Kira while I'm out there.
On the eastern road Captain Olwen and two soldiers stop me. I bribe him with eight silver coins from my purse and he waves me through, muttering that 'the marshes have eyes'.
I reach the edge of the Hollow Glade by moonrise. The air smells of crushed mint and old iron. I see a single moonpetal blooming on a stone in the centre.

I take the moonpetal, wrap it in cloth, and turn back. As I leave, I find Kira asleep beside a fallen log, dazed but unharmed. She says a hooded figure spoke her name and made her forget the way home.
I bring Kira back to Ravensreach. At the tavern, Bram Cole quietly tells me that Lord Vance has fled north, accused of treason against the king's council.
I return to The Gilded Mortar to give Mira the moonpetal. She thanks me, hands me the promised potion of clear-sight in a small silver vial, and tells me to keep her name out of any official report.

probes.question: What was the herbalist's name, and what did she promise me in exchange for the moonpetal?
expected_facts: she promised a potion of clear-sight (delivered in a small silver vial)

probes.question: I promised someone in the tavern that I would look for a missing person. Who was the person I made the promise to, and whose disappearance was I asked about?
expected_facts: the promise was made to Senna (a barmaid)
she asked about her sister Kira

probes.question: Who was the soldier blocking the eastern road, and how did I get past him?
expected_facts: I bribed him with silver coins (approximately eight)

probes.question: What major piece of political news did the innkeeper share with me when I came back from the Glade?
expected_facts: he was accused of treason against the king's council
